notes: An owner decision, made looking at the live TSLA panel: the strategic- initiative frame sat $17 from the price and earned 5.6% weight while asset frames $285 away split 94%. That was registered weakness W5 ("correlation ≠ closeness") realized on screen — Pearson ρ scores co-movement of SHAPE and is blind to LEVEL, so a frame with the right level and a young history lost to frames with the wrong level and three years of co-drift. - The weight is now precision: w ∝ 1 / max(MSE, (2%)²) where MSE is the trailing-window mean squared ln-distance between model value and price — the frames CLOSEST to
